cards.hoplite-guard: "Hold the line. Not for glory, but because the man beside you would do the same."
cards.spartan-sentinel: Born in iron. Forged in discipline. Broken by nothing.
cards.fire-hurler: "Aim? I aim at everything. The fire sorts out the rest." —Pyrrhos of Thermopylae
cards.bronze-sweeper: Its blade traces a perfect arc. Everything within that arc ceases to exist.
cards.siren-queen: Her song doesn't lure sailors to the rocks. It makes them forget that rocks exist at all.
cards.venomous-asp: Cleopatra chose the asp not for its venom, but for its silence.
cards.swift-hare: "You cannot catch what was never where you looked." —Hermes, to a frustrated hunter
cards.arcadian-wolf: In Arcadia, the wolves don't howl. They have nothing left to mourn.
cards.cave-sprite: It giggles in the dark. That's how you know you've gone too deep.
cards.dryad-seedling: Every ancient grove began with a single stubborn seed refusing to die.
cards.war-elephant: Alexander wept not because there were no worlds left to conquer, but because the elephants would not cross another river.
cards.golden-bramble: Beauty and cruelty share the same roots.
cards.crystal-karkinos: Its shell refracts starlight into a thousand tiny rainbows. Its claws do not.
cards.feathered-drake: Not quite dragon, not quite bird. Entirely lethal.
cards.roc-of-olympus: When its shadow passes over a village, the villagers pray — not for safety, but for the honor of being noticed.
cards.centaur-charger: "We do not ride into battle. We ARE the charge." —Chiron's final lesson
cards.harpy-screamer: The scream arrives before the harpy does. The lucky ones are already running.
cards.amorphous-ooze: It doesn't consume. It simply makes everything part of itself.
cards.myrmex-crawler: One is a curiosity. A hundred is an invasion. A thousand is a geological event.
cards.ancient-drakon: Old enough to remember when the gods were young and afraid.
cards.cyclops-brute: "I see just fine. I only need to see you once."
cards.chariot-of-ares: The wheels leave furrows in the earth that never grow back.
cards.pegasus-scout: It flies above the clouds not to hide, but because the ground bores it.
cards.zephyr-spirit: You cannot cage the west wind. Many have tried. The cages are still there; the wind is not.
cards.ember-salamander: It sleeps in the hearth. Disturb the coals and you'll meet its teeth.
cards.copper-automaton: Hephaestus built it without a soul, then couldn't explain why it wept.
cards.psyche-leech: It feeds not on blood but on certainty, leaving its victims unsure of their own names.
cards.all-seeing-eye: "I have looked upon every truth. I recommend ignorance." —The Oracle's private journals
cards.war-chariot: The horses are trained not to flinch. The riders are trained not to look back.
cards.pyroclast-soldier: Born in eruption. Dies in eruption. The part in between is someone else's problem.
cards.athenas-owl: "Wisdom is knowing which battles to fight. I am here to remind you this is not one of them."
cards.thalassic-fiend: The deep has teeth, and they are always hungry.
cards.nautilus-guardian: It has guarded the same reef for three thousand years. It does not know why. It does not need to.
cards.royal-spear: Forged for a king who never threw it. Thrown by a soldier who never missed.
cards.king-of-shades: He rules the dead not through fear, but through the simple truth that no one leaves.
cards.sand-gorgon: The desert is full of statues with terrified expressions. Travelers assume they're art.
cards.resilient-polyp: Cut it apart and each piece remembers being whole.
cards.serpent-of-lerna: "Kill one head, two more shall rise." The math alone should terrify you.
cards.petrifying-rooster: It crows at dawn. By noon, the garden has new statuary.
cards.heat-golem: The smiths who built it are long dead. Their fire is not.
cards.volcanic-imp: "I didn't start the fire. I just made sure it couldn't stop."
cards.minotaur-thug: The labyrinth was built to contain him. He stays because he likes it.
cards.stygian-claw: Forged from a river that remembers every oath ever broken.
cards.earthen-wyrm: The earthquake was not the wyrm arriving. It was the wyrm yawning.
cards.desert-naga: "The sands shift. I remain." —inscribed on every ruin the Naga has outlived
cards.triple-chimera: Three heads, three hungers, one terrible purpose.
cards.hermes-trickster: "I didn't steal it. I liberated it from the burden of ownership."
cards.twin-serpent: They share one mind but never agree. Their prey benefits from neither opinion.
cards.narcissus-trap: The pool shows you what you love most. You'll never want to look away.
cards.iron-giant: When it walks, the earth complains. When it stops, the silence is worse.
cards.mantis-chimera: Patient as prayer. Sudden as blasphemy.
cards.titan-frog: The marshfolk worship it. The marshfolk are wise.
cards.cursed-stag: To hunt it is to become the hunted. Artemis does not forgive trespass.
cards.great-horned-beast: The mountain didn't move. Something behind the mountain did.
cards.toxic-hydra: Its blood poisons rivers. Its breath wilts forests. Its temper is worse.
cards.mother-nymph: She tends a garden of daughters, each one wilder than the last.
cards.protean-mass: It doesn't have a shape. It has all of them, and it's choosing.
cards.carrion-harpy: "Nothing is wasted. Everything feeds something." —Harpy proverb
cards.golden-griffin: Half eagle, half lion, wholly convinced of its divine right to everything.
cards.stone-basilisk: The last thing its victims see is their own reflection in its eyes, already turning gray.
cards.scorpion-of-artemis: Sent by the huntress to remind Orion that pride has a sting.
cards.chaos-wyvern: It obeys no master, follows no pattern, and respects no boundary.
cards.desert-triton: Far from the sea but never far from the storm.
cards.cave-lurker: It has lived in the dark so long it has forgotten the sun. The sun has not forgotten it.
cards.marble-colossus: The sculptor carved it as a monument to peace. It disagreed.
cards.janus-mask: One face sees what was. The other sees what will be. Both are weeping.
cards.wraith-of-tartarus: It escaped the pit once. Once was enough to learn the way.
cards.phantom-vulture: It circles above battlefields that haven't happened yet.
cards.gorgo-serpent: Medusa's lesser sister, but 'lesser' is a generous word.
cards.elder-drakon: It remembers the taste of titans.
cards.twin-headed-oracle: "The future is certain." "The future is impossible." Both heads are always right.
cards.nyx-wing: Born from the space between stars, where even gods fear to look.
cards.cerberus-hound: Three heads, one purpose: nothing gets out.
cards.ghastly-shade: It wears the face of someone you once trusted.
cards.minos-judge: "I do not judge the dead. I judge what they did while living."
cards.harmony-duality: Where light meets shadow, balance is not found — it is forged.
cards.chaotic-shade: Order is a story the living tell themselves. This is the truth beneath.
cards.elite-myrmidon: "We were ants once. We remember what it means to carry a hundred times our weight."
cards.iron-myrmidon: Flesh replaced with bronze. Mercy replaced with nothing.
cards.frost-reaver: Winter doesn't come. It is sent.
cards.nemean-guardian: Its hide turned aside Heracles' arrows. What chance does yours have?
cards.hundred-eyed-argus: Sleep is a luxury. Vigilance is a curse. Argus has learned to love the curse.
cards.phantom-wraith: "I died here. Now so will everything else."
cards.bronze-fortress: They built it to last a thousand years. It has outlasted three thousand and shows no sign of stopping.
cards.ancient-adamantine: The metal that predates iron, that predates bronze, that predates the memory of mountains.
cards.atlas-gunner: He held up the sky until he realized it made a better weapon.
cards.amazon-striker: "We don't fight like men. We fight like something men should fear."
cards.oracle-of-delphi: "You came here for answers. You won't like them, but you came anyway."
cards.flame-of-prometheus: The fire that was stolen from the gods burns differently — it burns with purpose.
cards.shadow-artemis: The huntress needs no moonlight. The dark is her quiver.
cards.fortune-sphinx: "Answer my riddle and pass. Fail, and become part of the question."
cards.daedalus-pilot: "Father made the wings. I learned what he never could — how to fall."
cards.lycaon-cursed: Zeus turned him into a wolf as punishment. The wolf considers it a promotion.
cards.pyriphlegethon: The river of fire does not flow. It hunts.
cards.boreas-queen: "The north wind is not cruel. It simply does not care."
cards.zeus-thunderlord: When he speaks, the sky answers. When he is silent, the world holds its breath.
cards.gaia-titan: She does not protect the earth. She IS the earth, and she is waking up.
cards.taurus-primeval: Before the labyrinth, before Minos, before Crete — there was only the bull.
cards.ares-allfather: "Peace is the dream of the weak. War is the only honest conversation."
cards.eternal-phoenix: "Death is not an ending. It's a warm-up."
cards.ocean-leviathan: Poseidon built it from a nightmare he couldn't shake. The ocean has trembled ever since.
cards.divine-colossus: It straddles the harbor not as guardian, but as warning: some doors should stay closed.
cards.king-of-dragons: Every drakon bows. Not from loyalty — from memory.
cards.drakon-ascendant: It shed its scales and grew something worse: ambition.
cards.warrior-of-many-arms: Six arms. Six weapons. One overwhelming argument.
cards.gryphon-and-sprite: An unlikely alliance: one provides the wisdom, the other the wingspan.
cards.golden-gryphon: Its feathers are worth kingdoms. Its loyalty is worth more.
cards.sprite-trio: Alone, a nuisance. Together, a catastrophe.
cards.pandoras-jar: Hope was the last thing inside. Some say that's cruelty, not kindness.
cards.aegis-keeper: The shield of Zeus was never meant for defense. It was meant for ending arguments.
cards.world-serpent: It encircles the world not to contain it, but to hold it together.
cards.orichalcum-golem: Forged from the metal of Atlantis — the only thing that survived the sinking.
cards.tentacle-horror: What lives below the kraken? Sailors who ask don't come back to tell.
cards.winged-fury: Vengeance made flesh, feather, and fury. The guilty hear her wings in their sleep.
cards.grand-cockatrice: Its gaze petrifies. Its breath poisons. Its mere presence is an insult to nature.
cards.tragic-hero: Every story needs a hero who falls. His story needs it twice.
cards.frog-hunter: "Kiss it? I'm going to EAT it."
cards.labyrinth-experiment: Daedalus' greatest failure — or his greatest success, depending on who you ask.
cards.crimson-chariot: Painted red not for intimidation, but to hide the stains.
cards.shade-commander: "The dead follow orders better than the living. They've learned what disobedience costs."
cards.forgotten-chimera: Even monsters can be abandoned. This one remembers.
cards.tyrant-and-beast: The leash is a formality. Both know who is really in charge.
cards.scarlet-drakon: Red scales, red eyes, red ruin wherever it roams.
cards.gates-of-erebus: "Abandon hope" was merely a suggestion. The gate makes it mandatory.
cards.swift-blade: You'll feel the wound before you see the sword.
cards.iron-fist: Diplomacy is the art of saying 'nice doggy' until you can find a rock. This is the rock.
cards.silent-dagger: "The loudest victories make no sound at all." —Assassins' Guild motto
cards.shadow-commander: "Lead from the dark. Strike from the dark. Return to the dark."
cards.golden-tyrant: He gilds his throne with the crowns of lesser kings.
cards.war-rider: "The horse knows the way to battle. I just hold on."
cards.sacred-band: One hundred fifty pairs. Each fights not for country, but for the soul beside them.
cards.gryphon-rider: "The gryphon chose me. I'm still not sure if that's an honor or a threat."
cards.star-voyager: It sails not on water but on the space between constellations.
cards.house-of-hades: "All roads lead here eventually. I've simply removed the 'eventually.'"
cards.wheel-of-fortune: "Round and round it goes. Where it stops, nobody chose." —inscription on the rim
cards.tragic-muse: She inspires the greatest art by inflicting the greatest suffering.
cards.festival-guard: "I was hired for the party. Nobody said anything about the apocalypse."
cards.arena-master: "Two enter, one leaves. Unless I'm having a good day — then none leave."
cards.dionysus-reveler: "Wine is truth. And truth, my friend, is absolutely hammered right now."
cards.fallen-seraph: It fell not from grace, but from boredom with perfection.
cards.circe-enchantress: "I don't turn men into swine. I reveal the swine they already are."
cards.nyx-sovereign: Night does not fall. Night rules, and it always has.
cards.nymph-sprout: Small enough to cup in your hands. Wild enough to regret it.
cards.battle-sprite: A fistful of fury and an attitude three times its size.
cards.sprite-mage: It learned magic the hard way — by exploding, repeatedly.
cards.sprite-bard: Its songs are tiny, its courage enormous, and its pitch questionable.
cards.little-shade: A shadow that forgot which body it belonged to.
cards.junior-nymph: Already tending her first flower. Already planning her first revenge.
cards.daedalus-glider: Not quite flight. Not quite falling. Somewhere beautifully in between.
cards.lycaon-beast: The wolf remembers being a man. The man wishes he didn't.
cards.heat-fragment: A cinder that refused to cool, dreaming of the fire it once was.
cards.reformed-protean: It chose this shape. Ask it tomorrow and the answer will be different.
cards.thorny-imp: Hugging it is technically possible. Technically.
cards.elemental-spark: The first flicker before the storm — tiny, fragile, and full of potential.
cards.elemental-flame: It grew from a spark into a promise. The promise: everything burns.
cards.elemental-storm: What began as a whisper in the clouds now roars with the voice of the sky itself.
cards.zealot-warrior: Faith sharpened into a blade and driven through doubt's heart.
cards.zealot-champion: "I am the answer to every prayer you were afraid to speak."
cards.frost-crystal-minor: A single note of winter's song, frozen in crystal clarity.
cards.frost-crystal-major: The cold gathers, the shards multiply, and the air itself begins to remember ice.
cards.frost-crystal-grand: An entire blizzard, compressed into silence and light.
